public_readiness: With these corrections applied, the package is ready for coordinator sign-off. The six coordinator-confirmation items above should be reviewed before final public release. No Resource Hub URLs, no Djan Djan / venue / alcohol details, no overpromised eLibraryUSA account guarantee, and no unofficial embassy approval claims are present in the corrected set.
